profile.name: Divya Nirankari
profile.summary: AI/ML Engineer with 4+ years of experience specializing in healthcare AI and production-grade machine learning systems. Developed a high-accuracy ECG cardiac abnormality detection model (94% F1-score) using 1D ResNet architectures on the PhysioNet/CinC Challenge dataset. Proven expertise in building scalable REST APIs (10,000+ daily requests, 99.9% uptime) and optimizing database performance (40% faster query times) using FastAPI and PostgreSQL. Skilled in Python, PyTorch, and deep learning, with a focus on bridging the gap between research and real-world deployment.
profile.bio: As a seasoned software development expert, I possess a unique ability to craft and deploy high-performance, scalable web applications that harness the power of cutting-edge technologies, including the design and implementation of innovative machine learning models that catalyze business growth, optimize operational efficiency, and inform strategic decision-making, ultimately driving transformative outcomes and propelling organizations forward.
profile.address_ja: インド、グジャラート州、スーラト

personal.name_furigana: ディヴィア・ニランカリ
personal.address_furigana: インド、グジャラート州、スーラト
personal.commute_time: 海外在住のため応相談
personal.self_pr_ja: ヘルスケアAIを専門とするAI/MLエンジニアです。心電図（ECG）信号処理と1D ResNetによる異常検知、FastAPIによる本番API構築の実務経験があります。
personal.self_pr_ja_detailed: ヘルスケア分野のAI技術に強い関心を持つAI/MLエンジニアです。心電図（ECG）信号処理と1D ResNetなどの深層学習モデルの開発を専門としています。最先端の技術環境でチームの一員として社会に貢献することを目指しています。
personal.career_summary_ja: ヘルスケアAIとバックエンド開発を専門とするAI/MLエンジニア。REST APIの開発、データベースの最適化、プロダクションレベルのMLモデルの構築に実績があります。1D ResNetを用いた心電図の異常検知を専門としています。
personal.desired_conditions_ja: 勤務地：日本全国可／貴社規定に従います。

profile.name_furigana: ディヴィア・ニランカリ
profile.address_furigana: インド、グジャラート州、スーラト
profile.summary_zh: 资深Python与AI/ML工程师，专注于医疗AI及生物医学信号处理。曾在Logixbuilt Infotech主导高并发REST API开发（日均请求1万+，可用性99.9%），并通过PostgreSQL优化将响应速度提升40%。独立开发基于PhysioNet数据集的ECG心脏异常检测模型，采用1D ResNet架构，F1分数达94%。具备从科研到生产环境落地的全栈能力。
profile.summary_ko: 실무 경험을 보유한 Python 및 AI/ML 엔지니어로, 의료 AI 및 생체 신호 처리 분야에 전문성을 갖추고 있습니다. Logixbuilt Infotech에서 일일 1만 건 이상의 요청을 처리하는 고가용성 REST API를 개발하고 PostgreSQL 쿼리 최적화를 통해 성능을 40% 향상시켰습니다. PhysioNet 데이터셋을 활용하여 94%의 F1-score를 기록한 1D ResNet 기반 ECG 심장 이상 탐지 모델을 독자적으로 개발했습니다. 연구 성과를 실제 서비스로 구현하는 데 강점이 있습니다.

bullets: Designed production-grade ML models for international clients (India, UAE, Europe) using PyTorch and FastAPI.
Built real-time chatbot system integrated with WhatsApp, Telegram, Facebook Messenger.
Developed ECG cardiac abnormality detection model achieving 94% F1-score on the PhysioNet/CinC Challenge dataset.
Architected scalable backend systems with Redis caching and PostgreSQL data pipelines.

experience.resign_reason_ja: 一身上の都合により退社
bullets: Developed REST APIs using FastAPI handling 10k+ daily requests with 99.9% uptime.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries reducing average response time by 40%.
Built automated testing pipelines using pytest cutting bug detection time by 50%.

projects.name: Parkinson's Disease Detection System
projects.summary: Developed an AI-based system for early-stage Parkinson's detection using voice frequency analysis and spiral drawing patterns. Achieved 89% diagnostic accuracy using XGBoost and image processing techniques.

projects.name: AI-Engineer-Portfolio
projects.description: A highly dynamic, region-aware AI Engineer portfolio website. Features automated ATS‑compliant PDF generation, regional templates (Japan, Korea, Europe), and a secure React/FastAPI admin control panel.
projects.techStack: React, Tailwind CSS, FastAPI, Playwright, SQLite

research.title: Deep Learning Architectures for Cardiac Abnormality Detection using 1D ResNet
research.description: An independent research paper detailing the implementation and evaluation of a 1D ResNet model for ECG signal classification, achieving 94% F1-score on the PhysioNet dataset.

regional_cover_letters.uk: I am writing to express my strong interest in AI Engineer opportunities within the UK's burgeoning tech sector. With 3+ years of experience in healthcare AI and backend optimization, I am eager to contribute to UK-based innovation. I am particularly interested in how British healthtech firms are leveraging machine learning for early diagnosis. I require UK Skilled Worker visa sponsorship and am prepared for relocation.
regional_cover_letters.usa: I am highly motivated to bring my 3+ years of expertise in AI/ML and production-grade backend systems to the US technology market. My work on ECG abnormality detection using 1D ResNet aligns perfectly with the advanced medical AI research occurring in the United States. I am seeking H-1B visa sponsorship and am ready to contribute to world-class engineering teams.
regional_cover_letters.germany: With a deep focus on Healthcare AI and 3+ years of experience in building scalable machine learning systems, I am eager to join Germany's leading medical technology sector. My background in signal processing and FastAPI optimization positions me well for Industry 4.0 and MedTech roles in Europe. I am eligible for the EU Blue Card and require sponsorship for relocation to Germany.
regional_cover_letters.india: As an AI/ML Engineer with 3+ years of experience in the Indian and international tech ecosystems, I have developed a strong track record in building high-throughput APIs and accurate deep learning models. I am immediately available to join a forward-thinking Indian organization and drive impact through data-driven solutions.
regional_cover_letters.uae: I am excited by the UAE's ambitious AI Strategy 2031 and wish to contribute my 3+ years of experience in machine learning and backend engineering to the Gulf region's digital transformation. My expertise in building scalable, real-time AI systems is well-suited for the smart city and healthcare initiatives in the UAE. I am willing to relocate and require UAE employment visa sponsorship.
regional_cover_letters.china:
Dear Hiring Manager,

As an AI/ML engineer specializing in healthcare AI and production-grade machine learning systems, I developed and validated a 1D ResNet ECG anomaly detection model achieving a 94% F1-score on the PhysioNet dataset, and built high-availability REST APIs handling 10,000+ daily requests at Logixbuilt Infotech.

I possess end-to-end experience spanning from model validation to production deployment, including FastAPI backends, PostgreSQL query optimization, and the stable delivery of real-time AI services.

I closely follow the clinical application advancements of Tsinghua University, Peking University, Alibaba DAMO Academy, Baidu Health, and Ping An Good Doctor in the fields of medical imaging and cardiac AI.

I also plan to apply for a Class Z work visa through your company and am fully prepared to relocate to China. I hope to drive the production realization of healthcare AI products and support your team across the entire development and deployment lifecycle.

Best regards,

Divya Nirankari
dvnirankari@gmail.com | +91 9265768306

regional_cover_letters.china_zh:
尊敬的招聘负责人：

作为专注于医疗AI和生产级机器学习系统的AI/ML工程师，我曾在PhysioNet数据集上开发并验证了94% F1-score的1D ResNet心电图异常检测模型，并在Logixbuilt Infotech构建了日均1万+请求的高可用REST API。

我具备从模型验证到生产部署的端到端经验，包括FastAPI后端、PostgreSQL性能优化以及实时AI服务的稳定交付。

我关注清华大学、北京大学、阿里巴巴达摩院、百度健康和平安好医生在医学影像与心脏AI领域的实际应用进展。

我还计划通过贵公司申请Z类工作签证，并已做好赴华工作的充分准备。希望能够在贵公司推动医疗AI产品落地，并支持从研发到部署的全流程交付。

此致
敬礼

Divya Nirankari
dvnirankari@gmail.com | +91 9265768306
